title: Genome Edited (KO) Cell Line Generation –
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a8um7","text":"This protocol details steps taken to create KO cell lines in RAW 264.7 cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9eqcb","text":"DMEM (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 11965-092)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"82ega","text":"FBS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 16140-071)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8oo52","text":"Penicillin/Streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5pkjq","text":"CellStripper (Corning, 356230)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7hn9m","text":"Synthego CRISPR Gene Knockout V2 Mouse Kits","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5p2ti","text":"Lipofectamine CRISPRiMAX (ThermoFisher Scientific, CMAX00003)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aemki","text":"Cas9 (Synthego CRISPR Gene Knockout V2)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"18mbu","text":"Opti-Mem (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 31985062)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Plate 2.5 x 10^5 RAW 264.7 cells per well in a 6-well dish.
Transfect cells using Lipofectamine CRISPRiMAX, gene specific sgRNAs and recombinant Cas9 (Synthego CRISPR Gene Knockout V2).

CRISPRiMAX protocol In Tube 1 combine 62.5 µL Opti-MEM, 3.25 µL sgRNA (from 3 uM stock), 2.5 µL Cas9 (from 3 uM stock), and 2.5 µL Cas9+ then incubate for 00:05:00 . In Tube 2 combine 62.5 µL Opti-MEM and 3.75 µL CRISPRMAX then incubate for 00:05:00 . Combine tube 1 and tube 2. Incubate for 00:20:00 . Add drop-wise to 1 well containing 1.8 mL of media.
Plate single cells into 96-well dishes to obtain clonal cell lines. After subculturing, confirm cell lines via immunoblotting
creator: Amanda Bentley-DeSousa
